chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-1858 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For katcha peshi. 05.12.2016. Mr. Mir Noor Muhammad Talpur, Advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel a/w ASI Nizamuddin o/b of SHO P.S Husri. Respondents No.6, 8 and 10 are present. = Today, the respondent No.6-Haji Jaffar Khan is present in person and submits that he and his other partners have not caused any harassment to the petitioner, who was earlier working at their brick kiln premises but now he is no more working there and has taken a heavy advance of Rs.35,000/- from the said respondent No.6. If the respondent No.6 has any genuine grievance against the petitioner, he is at liberty to seek redressal of the same through due process of law but cannot extend any threats or cause harassment to the petitioner, which includes that petitioner cannot be allowed to do force labour at the premises of private respondents. The police officials have stated in their parawise comments filed by the learned State Counsel that Police is totally impartial in the matter and have not patronize any individual. With these observations and directions, the present petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
